underlying_goal: Begin implementing SIA DC09 TCP listener for alarm receiver project, starting with config changes and the TCP server skeleton
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly suggested over-engineered features (graceful shutdown, metrics, typed MessageHandler interface) that the user had to push back on as unnecessary YAGNI.
brief_summary: User started a new sprint implementing SIA DC09 TCP listener, collaboratively designed and implemented config changes and a basic TCP server skeleton, with the user frequently steering Claude away from over-engineering.
